particulars.description: 1. the freehold land known as 40 beechwood road, sanderstead, surrey, CR2 0AA, registered at hm land registry with title number SY62494;. 2. the freehold land known as 42 and 42A beechwood road, sanderstead, surrey, CR2 0AA, registered at hm land registry with title number SGL286404;. 3. the leasehold land known as 42A beechwood road, sanderstead, surrey, CR2 0AA, registered at hm land registry with title number SGL286403;. 4. the freehold land known as 9 morland road, croydon, london, CR0 6HA, registered at hm land registry with title number SY224025;. 5. the freehold land known as 15 morland road, croydon, london, CR0 6HA, registered at hm land registry with title number SY284086;. 6. the freehold land known as 13 morland road, croydon, london, CR0 6HA, registered at hm land registry with title number SY141700; and. 7. the freehold land known as 11 morland road, croydon, london, CR0 6HA, registered at hm land registry with title number SY40311.
Freehold of barrington lodge, 9-15 morland road, croydon. Registered with absolute title/s at the land registry under title numbers: SY224025, SY40311, SY141700 and SY284086.
Freehold of beechwood house. 40 beechwood road. South croydon. CR2 0AA. Registered with absolute title at hm land registry under title number SY62494.
Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
